name: Mimolot
street_level_visibility: Mimolot is explicitly reconciled as a mixed polity in which Elves, Humans, and Gnomes all hold stable demographic presence under differentiated functions.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Mimolot should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
